name: pr-rosey
description: Local-first Electron app for monitoring the current GitHub user's pull requests.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json --watch" "wait-on tcp:5173 dist-electron/main/index.js dist-electron/preload/index.js && VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test -- --run
